items.title: FX Hedging Gains Steam at US, UK Firms as War Sparks Volatility
items.summary: Companies in the US and the UK ramped up their currency hedges last quarter as the war in Iran roiled global markets, an industry survey shows.

items.title: European Stocks Near Record as Tech Rallies, Oil Prices Ease
items.summary: European stocks gained, edging closer to their pre-war record high, as technology shares climbed and easing geopolitical tensions sent oil prices lower.

items.title: France Sticks to Plans to Narrow Deficit as Iran War Weighs
items.summary: French Finance Minister Roland Lescure reiterated the government’s goal to reduce the deficit to 5% of output this year and below 3% in 2029 even as the Iran conflict weighs on the economy.

items.title: Merz Advisers Slash German Growth Forecast, See Faster Inflation

items.title: Yen hovers near intervention zone as traders assess Iran war outlook

I congratulate Muslims in Ukraine and around the world on the holiday of Kurban Bayram, Eid al-Adha. May this holiday bring reliable peace, blessings, and harmony to every family.

For its part, Ukraine is doing a lot to ensure that as many families as possible can celebrate this year’s Kurban Bayram in true safety. We are protecting life here – in Ukraine, in Europe – and also supporting the protection of life in partner countries in the Middle East, the Gulf region, and the South Caucasus. Dangers must not prevail in any part of the world.

We also remember our Ukrainian Crimea, from where Russia’s war against Ukraine began in 2014. And we are grateful to all those who do everything to support Ukraine and our people, who condemn the Russian occupation and help us bring people back from Russian captivity. We remember the Crimean political prisoners held by Russia and are working to bring them home to Ukraine. It is very important that the entire free world also does not forget those who are deprived of their freedom today. May this holiday strengthen all kind hearts.

Kurban Bayramı hayırlı ve mübarek olsun!

Eid Mubarak!

items.title: Сербский снайпер Берич: конфликт для России не кончится с завершением СВО
items.summary: Деян Берич отправился в армию в 18 лет, война для него началась в 1992-м. Затем были бомбардировки Сербии (входившей на тот момент в Югославию) 1999 года, и Россия протянула руку помощи братьям. Берич этого не забыл. В 2014-м он, тогда уже снайпер с позывным Деки, одним из первых иностранных добровольцев встал на защиту Донбасса. В 2023 году Берича тяжело ранили, и он больше не мог воевать. Но муж

items.summary:
